settings.heading: Press Inquiries
settings.text: We hope you agree that it's important to stand up for women in sports, and speak the truth. But either way, we're happy to provide resources needed to tell our story. Hit us up below and someone from our press team will be in touch shortly.
settings.additional_text: Please allow at least 2 business days for a response.

settings.text:
We hope you agree that it's important to stand up for women in sports, and speak the truth. But either way, we're happy to provide resources needed to tell our story. Please contact us at press@xx-xyathletics.com and someone from our press team will be in touch shortly.

For all other inquiries including help with your order, please contact us at orders@xx-xyathletics.com.
